mprViewIn3D.Description: Isolation of selected elements in a 3D view with the ability to set the Section Box size
mprViewIn3D.msg2: Select an element to orient the view
mprViewIn3D.nullSectionBoxMsg1: The selected mode does not support preselection of elements
mprViewIn3D.nullSectionBoxMsg2: Trimming cannot be performed for the selected elements
mprViewIn3D.tooltip1: Allows specifying an element to orient the 3D section box
mprViewIn3D.InViewScheduleMsg: Only preselection of elements from the model is available in the schedule
